title: Leidos Taps Retired Vice Admiral David Lewis to Lead Maritime Portfolio
text: RESTON, Va. , Sept. 22, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Leidos (NYSE: LDOS), a FORTUNE® 500 science and technology leader, today announced the appointment of Vice Admiral David Lewis, U.S. Navy (Ret) as Senior Vice President, Maritime.

title: Leidos Awarded Contract to Support Federal Highway Administration Policy Initiatives
text: RESTON, Va. , Sept. 20, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Leidos (NYSE: LDOS), a FORTUNE® 500 science and technology leader, has been awarded a new Blanket Purchase Agreement (BPA) by the U.S. Department of Transportation (USDOT) to provide program and technical support to the Federal Highway Administration's (FHWA) Office of Policy and Governmental Affairs.

title: U.S. Air Force Selects Leidos for ABMS Digital Infrastructure Consortium
text: RESTON, Va. , Sept. 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Leidos (NYSE: LDOS), a FORTUNE® 500 science and technology leader, was recently selected by the U.S. Department of the Air Force to join the service's newly launched Advanced Battle Management System (ABMS) Digital Infrastructure (DI) Consortium.

title: 7 Stocks to Buy to Play the Tech Cold War
text: In a situation that appears to be unprecedented, the U.S. is now in cold wars with two other, major powers: Russia and China. And given the huge importance of technology in today's world, America is also fighting a tech cold war with both of those nations.

title: Leidos: Tech Powerhouse With A Massive Market Opportunity
text: Leidos is a leading IT, Tech and Cybersecurity service provider. The business generated strong financial results for the second quarter of 2022, beating both top and bottom line growth estimates.

title: Leidos to Participate in The Morgan Stanley 10th Annual Laguna Conference
text: Live Audio Webcast Available on Sept. 15, 2022, from 2:35 p.m.
